cv_text: Junior data analyst with 2 years experience using Python, SQL, pandas and Excel. Built weekly sales dashboards and reporting projects for a retail team. Bachelor degree in economics with strong stakeholder communication.

Recent graduate with internship experience in Excel reporting, basic SQL queries and Tableau dashboards. Worked with a team to clean customer data and prepare monthly reports. Bachelor degree in business analytics.
Retail cashier with basic Excel exposure and campaign planning. No programming, database, or analytics work experience.
Data analyst with 3 years experience in Python, pandas, SQL, Power BI, Tableau and statistics. Delivered reporting dashboards for operations leaders and collaborated with finance stakeholders.
